title: bunii music pack.
body:
##  **wsg bunii fans.** 
### Music pack that **REPLACES** all 19 vanilla record discs with songs created by/featuring bunii.
A disclaimer that not ALL of bunii's songs can be found here, he's probably got something 50 released/unrealeased tracks so i've condensed the most popular and my favourite 19 songs. Cooked this up bc I was bored so if you'd like to see me update this for mod support or another artist please contact me on Insta **@thatsaxtuallywild**

> _**All credits & rights for music go to bunii**, I did not partake in production whatsoever._

- Visit [bunii's Spotify Page](https://open.spotify.com/artist/6mx3Y8XNLPaS2pjJbQFq3W?si=qNz4M8i0SSukreiIKyjImQ) for music
- Follow [bunii's Insta](https://www.instagram.com/lovebunii/)

## List of Music Disks:
![Chest graphic containing all acceptable music disks (vanilla)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a68f8eb691b24428beacc05847215a9c27ab47db.png)
###  Songs by Name: (Disk Name/Song Name)
- otherside - dont make me
- far - nyras
- ward - uncool
- pigstep - lets face it
- wait - GOOD RIDDANCE
- strad - embarrassment
- 11 - SAINT
- 13 - MINE
- 5 - disguise
- cat - REGRET
- chirp - medicine
- blocks - all that i can think about
- mall - galore galore galore
- mellohi - dionea
- precipice - NEED IT
- relic - Camera Girl
- stal - MYGOD
- creator - clueless
- creator (music box) - this is what you caused

we all love bunii ig?
